Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

He lowers his hands, relaxing fingers near his lower chest, before clasping them together with interlaced fingers in front of his lower torso. A ring is visible on his left hand. [10-14] The speaker vanishes, replaced by a close-up, angled shot of a 3D metallic logo against a black background. Text "ACTIVE SELF", "PROTECTION", and "PLAN" appears. The logo rotates, bringing the central snake emblem into sharper focus with white highlights tracing the raised edges of the metallic lettering.

[14-16] An angled metallic logo rotates and centers against a dark gradient, revealing "ACTIVE SELF" above a snake head emblem, "PROTECTION," and the tagline "ATTITUDE . SKILLS . PLAN" in silver lettering. [16-22] A bearded man in a white polo shirt appears; a red lower-third banner displays "JOHN CORREIA" with a snake logo, followed by a grey banner reading "PROFESSOR OF DEFENSE AGAINST THE DARK ARTS." An inset video in the top right shows a convenience store interior with a "KIRO 7" logo. The man gestures outward with open palms. [22-28] The text banners disappear. The man continues speaking against the black background with the inset video fixed stationary in the corner, clasping his hands near his waist with a neutral expression.

[28-38] A bearded man wearing a white polo shirt stands centrally against a black background, speaking with his hands clasped near his waist. An inset video remains fixed in the upper right corner, showing the interior of a convenience store with a 'KIRO 7' logo visible. The man continues to speak with slight facial movements and minor hand adjustments throughout this period. [38-40] The speaker disappears, replaced by full-screen surveillance footage of the convenience store interior, featuring aisles of snacks and refrigerators. An 'Active Self Protection' logo with a snake graphic appears in the top left corner. A news banner at the bottom displays 'NEW DETAILS SPANAWAY' alongside the 'KIRO 7' station logo.

[40-42] Surveillance footage shows a convenience store interior. A person in a dark blue jacket, dark pants, and dark hood enters from the right, extending their right arm near the counter. "Active Self Protection" and "ATTITUDE. SKILLS. PLAN" appear top left; "KIRO 7", "kiro7.com", and "facebook" are bottom right.
[42-46] The hooded individual points a dark, pistol-shaped object toward the left. The bottom right logo switches from "KIRO 7" to "FOX 13" displaying "48°". The person maintains the pointing gesture.
[46-50] A person with long dark hair in a dark top stands in the foreground facing the counter. The individual in the blue jacket continues pointing in the background. "Camera 03" appears near the logo. A red circle highlights the long-haired person's hands near the counter while the background figure keeps an arm extended.

[54-56] High-angle surveillance shows the checkout area where a person behind the counter uses the register while a dark-clad figure leans over the surface; a red "Winston" sign is top right, and "KIRO 7" is bottom right. [56-58] The view shifts to an aisle where an individual in a black hooded jacket bends forward, reaching for bottom shelves of a white wire rack with colorful snacks; "KIRO 7" is visible. [58-60] Back at the checkout counter, a person in a black hooded jacket stands behind the counter leaning forward as an arm in a white sleeve reaches toward the surface. [60-62] The person in the black hooded jacket stands behind a red counter, turning their head left to reveal a partially visible face, with a white sleeve near the edge; "Active Self Protection" and "KIRO 7" logos remain fixed.

recent_thinks: [50-52] The red circle highlighting the hands of the long-haired individual in the foreground disappears. This person remains standing at the counter. In the background, the individual in the blue jacket continues to point a dark object toward the left side of the store aisle.

[52-54] The camera angle switches to a closer view of the counter area. The news logo in the bottom right changes from FOX 13 back to KIRO 7. A person in dark clothing stands behind the counter while another figure leans over the register. A red sign with white text reading Winston is visible in the background.

[62-64] The camera angle shifts to a wider view of the store aisle. A person in a dark hooded jacket stands near the refrigerators on the right side. A news banner appears at the bottom reading "NEW DETAILS SPANAWAY" alongside the KIRO 7 logo.

[64-66] A person in a dark hooded jacket stands in the aisle, extending their right arm forward while holding a dark, pistol-shaped object. Shelves of snacks are visible behind them. The lower news banner reading "NEW DETAILS SPANAWAY" disappears, leaving only the station logo in the corner.

queries.question: What is the color of the short-sleeved polo shirt worn by the man? A. Black B. White C. Red D. Grey

answers.text: B

The 'Active Self Protection' logo is in the top left, and the 'KIRO 7' logo is in the bottom right corner.</think><answer></answer>

You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

The armed individual in the blue jacket remains in the background, continuing to aim the weapon. The "FOX 13" logo persists.

From 80s to 88s, surveillance footage captures a tense scene inside a convenience store. An individual in a blue hooded jacket stands in the mid-ground, extending their right arm to point a black handgun toward the counter area. In the foreground, a person with long dark hair stands near the register, facing the counter. The camera feed is labeled "Camera 03" in the bottom right, alongside a "FOX 13" logo showing "48°". A watermark for "ACTIVE SELF PROTECTION" with "ATTITUDE . SKILLS . PLAN" is in the top left. Throughout the sequence, the armed individual maintains their posture without significant movement, keeping the weapon trained on the area behind the counter where shelves of colorful merchandise are visible. The person in the foreground remains stationary near the point of sale terminal.

[88-94] A red circle overlay highlights an individual with long dark hair standing in the foreground near the register. PLAN" remains in the top left corner, while a "KIRO 7" news logo with "kiro7.com" and a twitter icon appears in the bottom right. The individual in the black jacket reaches toward the register, extending an arm over the counter surface. By the end of the sequence, the figure continues to lean over the register area with little significant movement observed.

You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
